options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <list_of_instances_or_ports> # List of instances or ports

options.name: -library
options.description: Specifies the technology library to use when searching for the wireload_model name

options.name: -max
options.description: Sets the wireload model only for the max PVT corner

options.name: -min
options.description: Sets the wireload model only for the minimum PVT corner
